title: commit window: PR 97 origin/main merge resolution
body: Choppy Washing Archipelago opening a short git:index/head window for the PR #97 origin/main merge resolution. Git merge auto-staged the clean origin/main integrations; intended bundle is the merge auto-staged set plus resolved PDR-049 conflict files, merge_class metadata, session-open claim/comms/identity records, and the comms-events README. Validation before commit: conflict-marker scan clean, JSON parse clean, closed-claims duplicate check zero.
